name: Szechuan Pork Stir-Fry
recipeIngredient: 1/2 lb Boneless pork, cut into thin strips
2 medium Zucchini, cut into julienne strips
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the pork, 1 tablespoon teriyaki sauce, and red peppers; set aside.
2. Mix cornstarch, remaining teriyaki sauce, vinegar, and 1 cup water in a bowl; set aside.
3. Heat 1 tablespoon oil in a wok or large skillet over high heat.
4. Add the pork mixture to the pan and stir-fry for 2 minutes.
5. Remove the pork from the wok.
6. Heat the remaining oil in the same pan.
7. Add onion and stir-fry for 2 minutes.
8. Add radishes and zucchini; sprinkle lightly with salt and stir-fry for an additional minute, or until vegetables are tender-crisp.
9. Stir in the pork and cornstarch mixture.
10. Cook and stir until the mixture thickens and boils. Remove from heat and serve immediately.
